news.headline: Charlton Aria Acquisition Corp. priced its $75 million Initial Public Offering of 7.5 million units at $10 each.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, Charlton Aria Acquisition Corporation (Nasdaq: CHARU) disclosed the pricing for its initial public offering of 7,500,000 units at $10.00 each. The units will be traded on the Nasdaq Global Market under the ticker symbol “CHARU” starting from the same day. Each unit includes one Class A ordinary share and one right to obtain one-eighth of a Class A ordinary share. Following the commencement of separate trading, the Class A ordinary shares and rights will be listed on Nasdaq as “CHAR” and “CHARR”, respectively. The underwriter holds a 45-day option to acquire up to an extra 1,125,000 units from the Company to cater for over-allotments, if any. The offering is anticipated to conclude on October 25, 2024, pending customary closing conditions.

news.headline: Mattress Firm's American Sleep Index reveals insights: 50% parents restrict kids on Halloween, 71% unconcerned about 2024 election's impact on sleep.
news.summary: Around 50% of parents are hesitant to allow their children to stay up later than usual on Halloween. Over 65% of adults experience an impact on their energy, mood, and focus due to Daylight Savings Time. Additionally, a significant portion, 71%, of Americans are not expected to lose sleep over the 2024 Presidential Election. This data was reported in Houston on October 24, 2024.

news.headline: Bay Area faces $110B cost with sea-level rise; inequitable climate impacts in at-risk neighborhoods without action.
news.summary: In San Francisco, it has been reported that Bay Area communities near the shore will face significant damage due to sea-level rise in the upcoming years. A new study by Next 10 and University of California Berkeley faculty indicates that around $110 billion will be required to combat sea-level rise by 2050. The report highlights the urgent need to revamp property institutions and land governance to fairly tackle the climate vulnerability of the region. It emphasizes that no coastal community will be immune to the consequences of this issue.

news.headline: US Coast Guard hosts free STEM festival "What Floats Your Boat?" for K-12 kids in Cleveland on Oct 24, 2024. Presented by STEM Global Action.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, in Cleveland, an organization called STEM Global Action (SGA) launched STEM SATURDAY events. These events provide a distinctive opportunity for students and parents to delve into STEM subjects together in a community setting. Participants take part in immersive, hands-on activities designed to spark curiosity and promote inquiry-based learning.

news.headline: Ataccama launches AI Agent for data management to enhance data quality, reduce costs. Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: Ataccama unveiled the Ataccama ONE AI Agent, an advanced and independent system that enhances data quality assurance while cutting operational expenses and simplifying processes, ensuring reliable data flow throughout the organization. This milestone was revealed in Boston on October 24, 2024.

news.headline: Union workers at Boeing reject new contract, extending strike at plane factories after $6.1 billion loss reported.
news.summary: Following Boeing's announcement of a $6.1 billion loss, a crucial vote took place to prolong a nearly six-week strike at facilities manufacturing its top-selling commercial aircraft.

news.headline: Han River in NYC offers free SHIN RAMYUN noodles. KCCNY brings Seoul taste to Midtown. "It's time for K-Culture" initiative.
news.summary: New Yorkers are being offered a unique opportunity to experience the vibrant culture of Seoul through the "It's time for K-Culture" initiative, a collaboration between the Korean Cultural Center New York (KCCNY) and Nongshim. The initiative, launched on October 24, 2024, aims to showcase the rich heritage of South Korea to the residents of New York City. The KCCNY, which operates under the Ministry of Culture, Sports, and Tourism (MCST), is spearheading this effort to promote cultural exchange and understanding. This initiative will be entirely free for attendees, making it accessible to a wide audience.

news.headline: MG Moving CEO Steve Kuhn participates in 3-day Moving Titan Retreat with industry specialists and hundreds of attendees in Tampa.
news.summary: Steve Kuhn, the CEO of MG Moving, participated in a panel of industry specialists during the 3-day Moving Titan Retreat, which attracted hundreds of attendees from emerging moving organizations nationwide. The event took place in Sterling, Virginia on October 24, 2024. Kuhn emphasized the importance of the retreats in showcasing the future direction of the moving industry.

news.headline: US September building permits were revised to -3.1% from -2.9%, and the annual rate was 1.425 mln units from 1.428 mln units.
CellTrust's SL2 Enterprise Capture wins "Mobile Compliance Platform of the Year" award for 2024 by Mobile Breakthrough Awards.
news.summary: Scottsdale, Arizona - CellTrust has been recognized for its SL2™ Enterprise Capture and secure mobile communication platform, winning the "Mobile Compliance Platform of the Year" award in the 8th annual Mobile Breakthrough Awards. This prestigious award is given out by Mobile Breakthrough, a renowned market intelligence organization, honoring leading companies and products in the wireless and mobile industry. CellTrust's achievement highlights its commitment to innovation and compliance in the mobile sector. The award underscores the company's success in providing a secure and compliant platform for mobile communications in 2024.

news.headline: Pinwheel launches Bill Navigator, saves customers money by tracking subscriptions within digital banking. Powered by detection algorithm.
news.summary: The Bill Navigator service is designed to assist financial institutions such as banks, credit unions, and fintech companies in assisting their customers to save money. It simplifies the process of monitoring, overseeing, and terminating subscriptions through the digital banking platforms. By utilizing a top-tier algorithm for detecting transactions, Bill Navigator stands out as a unique offering in this space, helping users effectively manage their finances and potentially reduce unnecessary expenses.

news.headline: Fly Fitness Studios is expanding in the Midwest and offering franchises in Denver, Kansas City, and Minneapolis, aiming for national growth by 2026 LINCOLN, Neb., Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: A fitness brand led by a female entrepreneur with a focus on community involvement is setting its sights on expanding across the nation by 2026. Fly Fitness Studios, based in Lincoln, Nebraska, revealed plans to franchise their concept which emphasizes high-intensity workouts within a supportive atmosphere. The announcement was made on October 24, 2024, indicating a shift towards active growth strategies. This move is expected to significantly increase the brand's reach, with a goal of establishing numerous new locations over the next few years. Fly Fitness Studios aims to bring its unique fitness experience to a wider audience, highlighting a commitment to wellness and inclusivity.

news.headline: Apps Associates launches AppsAccelerate for Oracle SCM in Boston, offering real-time insights and workflow automation for supply chain management.
news.summary: In Boston, a new program called AppsAccelerate is being introduced to assist Oracle SCM users in optimizing their supply chain operations. This program offers real-time insights, workflow automation, and incorporates industry best practices to ensure efficiency. AppsAccelerate aims to enhance supply chain operations and is designed to improve overall performance for Oracle SCM users.

news.headline: WATT Fuel Cell wins 2024 North America Technology Innovation Leadership Award for high-efficiency SOFC systems.
news.summary: In San Antonio on October 24, 2024, Frost & Sullivan conducted research on the high-temperature solid-oxide fuel cell (SOFC) sector. They acknowledged WATT Fuel Cell (WATT) for their production of high-efficiency SOFC systems. The award highlights WATT's outstanding performance in the industry. The specific achievements and the percentage of efficiency increase were not provided in the statement.

news.headline: Cemex named a Texan by Nature 20 honoree for the sixth consecutive year by Texan by Nature.
news.summary: Houston, as of October 24, 2024, Cemex has been honored as one of the Texan by Nature 20 (TxN 20) for the sixth year in a row. The award, presented by the conservation non-profit organization Texan by Nature founded by Laura Bush, recognizes Cemex's ongoing commitment to environmental conservation.

T. Rowe Price launches first thematic ETF, TTEQ, targeting technology sector on NASDAQ with NASDAQ-GS: TROW, on Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: Today, the T. Rowe Price Technology ETF (TTEQ) commenced trading on the NASDAQ. This marks the debut of T. Rowe Price's initial thematic actively managed exchange-traded fund. The announcement was made by the global investment management firm T. Rowe Price (NASDAQ-GS: TROW), based in Baltimore. The launch of the T. Rowe Price Technology ETF signifies a significant new addition to the firm's investment offerings.

news.headline: Keurig Dr Pepper reported Q3 earnings per share of 51 cents, sales of $3.89 billion (missed estimate of $3.93 billion), and an adjusted operating income of $1.050 billion. CEO Tim Cofer remains optimistic about achieving full-year outlook. Boosts portfolio with GHOST energy drink business.
news.summary: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (NASDAQ:KDP) stocks are witnessing a decrease in trading on Thursday following the company's third-quarter report. The adjusted earnings per share for the quarter stood at 51 cents, in line with market expectations. However, quarterly sales amounted to $3.89 billion, marking a 2.3% increase but falling short of the analyst consensus of $3.93 billion. CEO Tim Cofer expressed optimism about meeting the full-year outlook and highlighted progress in their strategic goals. Adjusted operating income saw a rise of 7.5% to $1.050 billion, representing 27% of net sales. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Meijer's Team Gives program donated to 500 Midwest nonprofits, fostering community support and engagement.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, in Grand Rapids, Michigan, Meijer revealed the outcomes of its fourth Meijer Team Gives initiative, which involved providing unexpected contributions to close to 500 nonprofit organizations in Midwest regions. The program holds significant sentimental value for Meijer as it provides opportunities for their team members to give back to the community.

news.headline: Fannie Mae chooses winner for 25th Community Impact Pool, selling 29 non-performing loans totaling $7.2 million.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, Fannie Mae revealed the successful bidder for its twenty-fifth Community Impact Pool (CIP) containing non-performing loans. The deal is set to be finalized by December 20, 2024, and encompasses 29 significantly overdue loans with a total value of $7.2 million.

news.headline: Valero Energy reports Q3 revenues of $32.876 billion, beating consensus of $31.131 billion. Refining segment posted operating income of $565 million. Ethanol segment operating income at $153 million. Refining throughput averaged 2.9 million barrels per day.
news.summary: Valero Energy Corporation (NYSE:VLO) saw its shares rise as it announced third-quarter FY24 revenues of $32.876 billion, surpassing the estimated $31.131 billion. In the Refining segment, the operating income dropped to $565 million from the previous year's $3.4 billion, with refining throughput at an average of 2.9 million barrels per day due to maintenance activities. The Ethanol segment reported an operating income of $153 million, down from $197 million in the third quarter of 2023, with production volumes averaging 4.6 million gallons per day.

news.headline: DailyPay receives $100M credit commitment from Citi, total secured credit facility now $760M, supporting growth.
news.summary: Worktech company DailyPay, Inc. has announced securing an increased credit facility to $760 million, further supporting its growth and solidifying its position as a leader in the industry. The company specializes in earned wage access, enabling employees to access their earned wages before the traditional payday. This development comes as part of DailyPay's strategy to expand its presence and offer innovative solutions in the worktech sector.

news.headline: Northeast Indiana Bancorp, Inc. raises cash dividend for 30th consecutive year. Proudly announces increase to shareholders.
news.summary: HUNTINGTON, Ind., October 24, 2024 - Northeast Indiana Bancorp, Inc. (OTCQB: NIDB), the holding company of First Federal Savings Bank, has recently declared a higher cash dividend for its shareholders. This marks the 30th consecutive year of dividend growth for the Corporation.

news.headline: Midea America introduces new freestanding ranges in Parsippany, NJ with modern design and practical features.
news.summary: Midea America, a renowned global home appliance company, recently unveiled their latest collection of freestanding ranges in Parsippany, New Jersey on October 24, 2024. These innovative ranges boast a modern design and are equipped with a host of practical features to enhance user convenience. With a focus on functionality and aesthetics, these ranges are sure to appeal to consumers looking for a blend of style and usability. Keep an eye out for this exciting new range lineup, as Midea aims to provide top-notch appliances that cater to the needs of the modern household.

news.headline: Shaklee expands into Australia, marking a milestone as it nears 75th anniversary. Founder invented first U.S. multivitamin.
news.summary: As it nears its 75th anniversary, Shaklee, a prominent health and wellness brand, is embarking on a significant growth phase. The company, known for pioneering the first multivitamin in the U.S., is expanding into Australia, its latest international market. This move marks an important milestone for Shaklee as it strengthens its global presence. Established in 1949, the brand has continued to innovate and now looks to capitalize on the growing health and wellness sector. With this expansion, Shaklee aims to tap into Australia's market potential and reach a wider audience. This strategic decision aligns with the brand's commitment to promoting well-being and will set the stage for continued success in the future.

news.headline: Matt Simon named VP of Scripps News - veteran journalist, to oversee vision, leadership, and editorial programming.
news.summary: In Cincinnati on October 24, 2024, the E.W. Scripps Company (NASDAQ: SSP) announced the appointment of Matt Simon as the vice president of Scripps News. With extensive experience in journalism, Simon will oversee the strategic direction, leadership, editorial content, and programming for Scripps News on a national scale.

news.headline: Inner Haven Wellness introduces virtual IOP for adults with eating disorders across Wisconsin; available state-wide.
news.summary: A reputable eating disorder treatment center, Inner Haven Wellness, based in Madison and Neenah, Wisconsin, has revealed the launch of a virtual Intensive Outpatient Program (IOP) tailored for adults. The new program is now available for individuals across the state.

news.headline: BoE's Mann: There is no prospect of rates returning to pre-pandemic levels.
Dow Jones drops after jobless claims, Tesla up 17% on earnings. Market reactions mixed. Tesla surge notable.
news.summary: Today, the stock market experienced a decline as the Dow Jones dropped following unexpected jobless claims. On the other hand, Tesla stock saw a significant increase of 17% due to promising earnings reports. This divergence in the market performance reflects the impact of economic indicators and company-specific news on investors' sentiment. The Dow Jones falling indicates a challenging economic environment, while Tesla's surge highlights positive developments within the company. Investors are closely monitoring these trends as they navigate the volatile market conditions.

news.headline: Q2 Holdings partners with Envisant to migrate prepaid card portfolio for credit unions using Q2 Fabric.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, leading financial services transformation provider Q2 Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: QTWO) revealed a partnership with Envisant, an award-winning credit union service organization. Envisant will leverage Q2 Fabric to offer prepaid card services to its credit union customers. Q2 Fabric is a comprehensive solution combining top-tier digital banking experience, a contemporary core system (Helix), and a strong pre-integrated fintech platform. This collaboration marks a significant advancement in meeting the needs of credit unions, enhancing their service offerings.

news.headline: Predictive Index enhances hiring efficiency with Greenhouse Software integration, reducing manual effort.
news.summary: The integration of Greenhouse Software by The Predictive Index in Westwood, Massachusetts, has significantly enhanced hiring processes. This improvement has resulted in increased hiring efficiency, better candidate experience, and a reduction in manual effort. This development is crucial as it not only streamlines operations but also ensures a more effective recruitment process.

news.headline: Pharmacy automation system TruCard™ by JFCRx™ helps reduce card filling costs by up to 70%, aiding pharmacies' efficiency.
news.summary: In Genoa City, Wisconsin, pharmacies are facing challenges due to unpredictable market conditions and major regulatory shifts. To address this, leveraging automated production presents a chance to enhance efficiency, boost profitability, and slash operational expenses significantly. JFCRx™, a pharmacy automation solutions provider, is introducing TruCard™, a system for packaging and inspecting multi-dose adherence blister cards. This innovative solution can assist pharmacies in lowering their operational expenses related to card filling by as much as 70%.

news.headline: Deluxe wins UiPath AI25 Award for AI and automation innovation, recognizing top 25 customers, accelerating business outcomes.
news.summary: Deluxe, a leading Payments and Data company headquartered in Minneapolis, has been honored with the prestigious UiPath AI25 Award. This award recognizes the top 25 innovative customers of UiPath, a renowned automation technology company, leveraging AI and automation to drive significant business transformations. Deluxe was lauded for its exemplary use of these technologies at UiPath FORWARD, the company's flagship event bringing together AI and automation thought leaders globally. The UiPath AI25 Awards highlight customers utilizing cutting-edge AI and automation solutions to propel their organizations towards greater success.

news.headline: Edgecore Wi-Fi announces release of EAP105, a high-performance Wi-Fi 7 Access Point, in Taiwan.
news.summary: Edgecore Wi-Fi has recently made an announcement regarding the availability of their new product, the EAP105. This high-performance Wi-Fi 7 access point is now accessible to customers.

news.headline: Skyfire's payment network for AI Agents grows rapidly, facilitating autonomous transactions. They process payments between AI Agents and businesses, receiving new funding.
news.summary: In an announcement today, Skyfire reported substantial growth in their unique payment network tailored for the AI Agent economy. This network allows for autonomous transactions across various entities including AI Agents, LLMs, data platforms, online retailers, and service providers. Since its launch, the company has witnessed rapid expansion, processing payments between AI Agents and a variety of businesses such as LLM aggregators and major financial services. Furthermore, Skyfire revealed they have received fresh funding from C, reinforcing their position in the market.

news.headline: Arteria AI named one of the top 100 innovative fintech startups by CB Insights for 2024.
news.summary: Arteria AI has been recognized by CB Insights in its seventh annual Fintech 100, highlighting the 100 most promising private fintech firms globally. This prestigious accolade showcases Arteria AI's position among the top companies in the industry.

news.headline: Iconectiv prioritizes security during Cybersecurity Awareness Month, emphasizes commitment to strong security posture.
news.summary: In Bridgewater, N.J., the global organization iconectiv highlights the significance of Cybersecurity Awareness Month in October amid the ever-changing digital threats. With cyber threats growing in complexity each day, businesses worldwide are emphasizing the importance of strong security measures. iconectiv reaffirms its dedication to upholding a robust security stance across its platforms and solutions. By making security a fundamental aspect of its operations, iconectiv aims to instill confidence in businesses, positioning itself as a dependable and trustworthy communications partner.
